{
  "done": false,
  "title": "The Docker Mental Model and Building Your First Image",
  "scope": "Establish a fast, working mental model of Docker by briefly contrasting containers with VMs without getting bogged down in theory. Then, explain how Docker images are built using layers and introduce Dockerfile basics so the learner can write the blueprint for their Node app.",
  "concepts": [
    "Containers vs VMs",
    "Docker images and the layer system",
    "Dockerfile basics"
  ],
  "estimatedSections": 2
}
